generation_config.prompt_used: Transform this cat image into a vivid cyberpunk digital painting with neon lighting, glowing eyes, futuristic city background, holographic accents, high contrast, and cinematic detail while preserving the cat as the main subject. Use bold artistic style cues, distinctive color palette, cinematic contrast, and unmistakable stylized visual treatment. Preserve the original composition, subject identity, spatial layout, and important objects. Visual anchors: A balanced landscape image dominated by mixed color, red, blue tones with sky, cat, fur. Local fallback approximation: The scene appears to contain a warm-toned central animal/face-like subject against a simpler background. Key visible elements: sky, cat, fur, eyes. Avoid distorted text, watermarks, and artifacts. Make the transformation much stronger: neon lighting, futuristic environment, high contrast, cinematic detail, and unmistakable cyberpunk visual style. Address this critique: Decision policy: ACCEPT if visual_relevance >= 7, prompt_faithfulness >= 7, transformation_quality >= 7, and automatic signal >= threshold; otherwise REVISE. The generated image has pixel similarity 0.92, color similarity 0.03, brightness shift -0.04, and change level 0.08 for stylization mode. Automatic signal (heuristic_proxy) is 0.757. CLIP was unavailable or disabled, so this score is a labeled color/brightness heuristic proxy rather than true CLIP similarity.
